overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city district. The player character moves from a plaza with food stalls past an escalator structure, along covered sidewalks with green neon lighting, and across a busy intersection with holographic billboards and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with food stalls and escalator access

events.description: turns left from open plaza onto covered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past outdoor seating and an escalator structure with red neon trim

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table of food stall

entered.detail: outdoor eatery with green fluorescent lighting and red paper lanterns
traditional Asian lanterns hanging from building facade
multi-level escalator with red neon trim and circular upper platform
futuristic circular platform suspended above the intersection with red neon lighting
large floating advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, illuminated by green neon from a food stall on the left and red neon from an escalator structure on the right. The player walks past seated pedestrians and turns left onto a covered sidewalk, with a large holographic billboard visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk under building awnings with green neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: overhanging roof with green neon strip lighting covering the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk sheltered by building overhangs, the scene is dominated by green neon lighting from storefronts on the left. Red paper lanterns continue to line the path while the escalator structure and food stall recede behind. The holographic billboard shifts to the left as the player progresses toward the intersection ahead.

events.description: NPC dialogue appears as subtitle: 'Hey, where the hell would you...'
exits covered sidewalk and enters open intersection area with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and beginning to cross the street while looking up at the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: extremely tall building with vertical neon signage and multiple holographic displays
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered sidewalk, the player approaches a wide intersection dominated by a towering skyscraper with vertical neon signage. Dialogue from an NPC appears on screen as the player steps onto the yellow crosswalk lines. The circular platform with red neon lighting looms larger in the center of the intersection as vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with futuristic traffic

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past through the intersection
green sports car speeds through the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing across the wide intersection toward the central platform, observing futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding through intersection

entered.detail: outdoor vendor stalls located beneath the circular platform structure

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide intersection toward the central circular platform, now much closer and revealing market stalls underneath. Various futuristic vehicles including a yellow taxi and green sports car drive past through the intersection. The tall skyscraper fades from view as the player focuses on reaching the other side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district, moving from a sheltered plaza into the open chaos of a futuristic intersection. It begins in a wide plaza illuminated by green and red neon, passing seated pedestrians and a food stall before turning onto a covered sidewalk. As the camera progresses under building overhangs, the scene is dominated by green storefront lighting and red paper lanterns while the initial plaza structures recede into the distance. The view then opens up as the player emerges from the shelter toward a towering skyscraper with vertical signage, stepping onto yellow crosswalk lines amidst passing traffic. Finally, the camera moves across the wide intersection, passing a yellow taxi and a green sports car to approach a central circular platform with market stalls beneath its red neon glow.
